title: Add Time Controls below Global Control button (surgical placement only)

requirements.text: In the left panel of LocationMapExplorer.tsx, insert the TimeControls component directly below the Global Control button section, which itself sits below the Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls. No other layout elements, ordering, styling, or component positions in the left panel or elsewhere in the UI should be changed from v1153.

quotes: I want them to below the global control button below the day/night terminator and twilight zone
I need each step to only change the UI layout affected. you always changed other layout which is not good.

acceptanceCriteria: Time Controls section appears directly below the Global Control button in the left panel
Global Control button remains below the Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls, as in v1153
No other panel sections, buttons, or layout elements have moved, been restyled, or been removed compared to v1153
All other UI elements (map, right panel, top bar, music player, etc.) are pixel-identical to v1153

requirements.text: Ensure the TimeControls component retains its full original functionality: it must animate and display how the solar terminator moves across the 3D globe at different times of day, including Real, Hourly, and Yearly modes with play/pause controls. Wire up the time state from LocationMapExplorer so the terminator on the InteractiveGlobe updates in response to the time controls.

quotes: the button didn't carry its original features when added, which is it will show how the terminator moves on the 3d globe at different time

acceptanceCriteria: Real, Hourly, and Yearly mode buttons are present and functional in the TimeControls component
Play/pause control animates the terminator across the 3D globe when activated
The solar terminator position on the InteractiveGlobe visually updates as time progresses during animation
Stopping or pausing the animation freezes the terminator at the current time position

constraints: Only the specific section of the left panel around and below the Global Control button may be modified — no other layout, styling, or component changes are permitted
v1153 is the stable base; all changes must be strictly additive/positional relative to that version
Do not alter InteractiveGlobe.tsx internals beyond what is necessary to accept a time prop for terminator positioning
nonGoals: Redesigning or restyling any part of the UI
Moving or reordering any existing panel sections other than inserting TimeControls in the specified location
Adding new backend endpoints or data models
Changes to the right panel, top bar, map component, or music player
